use_cases: Retro gaming-themed call-to-action buttons for game studios or developers
Pixel-art styled CTAs for retro/nostalgia product landing pages
Gaming community or esports platform interface buttons
Arcade or entertainment website navigation elements
ai_summary: A pixel-art inspired button component featuring an 8-bit retro gaming aesthetic with decorative pixel border elements. The button includes a layered structure with left and right pixel columns and a central background, creating a nostalgic Tetris-like visual effect. Designed for retro-themed interfaces, gaming products, or nostalgic marketing campaigns requiring a pixelated visual language.
